positive: A whimsical, symmetrical, and highly stylized woodland creature portrait. The main subject is a majestic fox sitting amongst lush, bioluminescent ferns and stylized flowers. The fox is rendered with strong, graphic lines, giving it a clean, almost woodcut quality, yet retaining photorealistic detail in its fur texture. The background uses deep indigo and sapphire blues, contrasting sharply with vibrant emerald greens and pops of neon coral. Use a limited, highly saturated color palette. Composition should be centered and balanced, suitable for a chest print on a t-shirt. Studio lighting, cinematic, hyper-detailed, graphic novel style, flat lay aesthetic, negative space utilized.
negative: blur, low resolution, text, watermark, signature, copyright, messy, grunge, noisy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, bokeh, amateur, logos, trademarks, poorly drawn, disfigured, ugly
